findings.summary: Test evidence is stale and does not cover this changeset. test-status exits 1 (stale: evidence 2026-06-24T16:09:15Z predates session 2026-06-25T02:15:27Z), and the evidence was captured on a different branch (feat/skills-certs, sha f306fbb) — not this branch's commit ed9aa45. The new B-branch test in format.test.js is therefore unverified by recorded evidence. Re-run the suite on this branch to refresh evidence before creating the PR.

Semantic honesty check passed but worth noting: the AI Tokens headline value is cloud+local (allTokens), while the delta badge reflects only the cloud portion (aggregateDeltas.tokens). This is a deliberate, disclosed mismatch (local inference has no weekly baseline) and is documented in both the inline comment (lines 169-172) and CHANGELOG. Not misleading given the disclosure, but the discrepancy is invisible to a user who only sees the tile — acceptable trade-off, recorded for transparency.

summary: 0 blocking, 1 warning, 1 note. Graceful degradation verified (totals.deltas = aggregateDeltas || null; every tile reads d ? d.x : null, so older manifests render no badges). formatDelta B-branch math verified correct (6191876497 -> +6.19B, 2.5e9 -> +2.50B; threshold >=1e9 mirrors formatBigNumber). Diff is single-commit, well-scoped, no derived-view files touched despite views_enabled. Only gating item: refresh stale test evidence on this branch before PR. Ready to create once test evidence is regenerated.
